purpose: Auditable institutional memory for every ratified (or rejected) prior. Required on every GATED promote/reject.

field_notes.prior_id: Stable ID of the live or rejected prior (policy_snapshot.snapshot_id or derived prior key)
field_notes.origin_event: Incident / job / pattern source that triggered learning
field_notes.evidence_links: Array of receipt paths, job IDs, pattern export paths, shadow run IDs
field_notes.why_accepted_or_rejected: Human or gate rationale; never empty on decision
field_notes.affected_loops: loop_id list impacted by this prior
field_notes.applicable_runways: Runway family or recipe IDs this prior may apply to
field_notes.applicable_customers: Optional customer/tenant scope; omit if global
field_notes.expiry: ISO8601 or null; null means no automatic expiry

example.note: Example only; real receipts require live shadow evidence
